description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wardrobe with a classic, rectangular silhouette and a smooth, painted finish. The front features two large hinged doors adorned with subtle decorative trim at the top and two small, vertically oriented handles on each door. Below the doors are two spacious drawers, each with its own handle, providing additional storage. The top and bottom edges of the wardrobe are slightly extended, giving it a traditional, elegant appearance. The sides and back are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the functional design. The wardrobe appears to be constructed primarily from wood, likely with metal hardware for the handles and internal mechanisms.
description: A tall, classic wardrobe with two paneled doors, two lower drawers, and subtle decorative trim, finished in a smooth, neutral color.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large paneled doors with handles and two drawers at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, flat surface with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned back panel with no visible openings or hardware.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain, featureless surface.
